The player is at (2,2), already to the right of that box, so I can push left right now—but that would shove the box into the wall at (2,0), a non-target corner-like dead position, which is bad. I need to reposition above or below? To push the box at (2,1) up onto (1,1), I must stand at (3,1). That square is reachable by moving around through the open lower area: down, down, left. The immediate best step is to start that repositioning by moving down. This also avoids disturbing the other box at (3,4) prematurely.
